notes: Switched Jenkins jobs to kickoff jobs and synchronized related updates.
Added support for Team and Teamspace fields in plugin integrations. These fields can now be configured during plugin setup and integration.
Upgraded the NPM Wrapper package to the latest supported version.
Enhancement: Loop Data Engine support for external DevOps tool resources.

Minor bug fix: The Jenkins task in deployment remains incomplete when the Velocity instance goes down during deployment. When the instance comes back online with the new version, the task still does not get marked as complete.

Bug fix: The Jenkins task in deployment remains incomplete when the Velocity instance goes down during deployment. When the instance comes back online with the new version, the task still does not get marked as complete.
Use correct username on task completion
Fix for Build-Revision mismatch in Jenkins Integration
Added support for process parameters coming from Git Parameter and Active Choices plugins
Warning logs added for skipping unsupported process parameters
Add revision to builds for proper dot linking
Fix integration name not showing in pipeline stage task selection
Fix external build link not appearing in deployment plan task
